message:
fix: pipeline stdin, shell whitespace, WebSocket safety, and perf

- Pipeline first command now receives original stdin instead of empty string
- Tab characters treated as word separators in parseCommand
- Newline characters treated as command separators in splitChain
- All remaining ws.send() calls wrapped in try-catch for disconnect safety
- reconcileIndex normalizes paths from R2 listing (defense-in-depth)
- ensureParentDirs fast path skips INSERT loop when parent already exists
- 2 new tests for tab and newline handling
